name: firefox-extension

scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run package:xpi
scripts.package:xpi: mkdir -p web-ext-artifacts && rm -f web-ext-artifacts/browser-control-mcp-$npm_package_version.xpi && zip -r web-ext-artifacts/browser-control-mcp-$npm_package_version.xpi manifest.json options.html assets dist/background.js dist/options.js

description: Browser Control MCP Firefox Extension / Add-on
